brief: Promote our Tong Sui Coconut Milk drink in a 15-second vertical video. Show the creamy texture and tropical ingredients. Target young adults who love Asian desserts.
Create a 20-second promo for our new Mango Pomelo Sago drink. Highlight the fresh mango chunks, pomelo pearls, and sago balls. Feel should be premium and indulgent.
Show our Black Sesame Walnut drink as the perfect winter warm-up. 15-second cozy vibes, steam rising, comfort food aesthetic. Appeal to health-conscious customers.
Launch video for our Red Bean Matcha Latte. 20 seconds, showing the layered pour, rich red bean, and premium matcha powder. Target matcha lovers on social media.
Quick 15-second TikTok promo for our Durian Ice Cream Mochi balls. Fun energetic tone, show the durian filling oozing out. Bold, quirky, memorable.
Morning fitness motivation video, 20 seconds. Show someone doing a 5AM workout routine — stretching, running, protein shake. Energetic music vibe, sunrise backdrop.
Solo travel vlog highlight for Kyoto Japan, 20 seconds. Cherry blossoms, temple visits, street food. Dreamy cinematic feel, peaceful soundtrack.
Healthy meal prep Sunday video, 15 seconds. Show colorful veggies, portioning meals, organized fridge. Clean aesthetic, wellness brand feel.
Skincare evening routine, 20 seconds. Show cleansing, serum application, moisturizer steps. Soft lighting, minimal aesthetic, luxury feel targeting women 25-35.
Home coffee ritual, 15 seconds. Barista-style pour over at home, specialty beans, latte art. Cozy morning atmosphere, slow living aesthetic.
Brand awareness video for a B2B SaaS startup helping teams collaborate with AI. 20 seconds. Show the problem (messy meetings) then solution (clean dashboard). Professional tone.
NGO impact video for a reforestation charity. 20 seconds. Show the problem of deforestation, volunteers planting trees, healthy forest recovery. Emotional and inspiring.
Fashion brand awareness for sustainable streetwear. 15 seconds. Show the manufacturing process, eco-friendly materials, stylish models. Young urban audience.
Restaurant brand video for a modern Cantonese fine dining restaurant. 20 seconds. Show the chef, signature dishes, elegant interior. Upscale Hong Kong vibe.
Online education platform brand video, 20 seconds. Show diverse students learning, interactive lessons, certificate achievement. Empowering and accessible tone.
